labeling_authority: Owner decision D3 (2026-07-15): source-cited labeling delegated to takeover agent with owner batch sign-off
negative_semantics: expected_relation_present=false means the relation is NOT asserted by any source in the labeling frame (the fetched corpus). Each negative records the sources checked. It is a claim about the cited frame, not about the world.
